opportunities.title: D&D News Dump Decoded: What Mike Shea's EN World Appearance Actually Changes at Your Table
opportunities.why_now: A major D&D news livestream just dropped with EN World and Sly Flourish's Mike Shea, meaning the rules chatter needs a rules-first translation for GMs.
opportunities.angle: Numbered rundown of concrete rules/mechanics implications, skip the hype, cite what's confirmed vs. speculative

opportunities.title: The Rules Are Already Written: Why 'Lazy' Prep Actually Means Better Rules Mastery
opportunities.why_now: Sly Flourish just published a fresh lazy-campaign prep piece that's a natural tie-in to a rules-first brand voice.
opportunities.angle: Response/companion post reframing 'lazy prep' as knowing the rules cold so you don't need heavy notes; link back to Sly Flourish

opportunities.title: Send In the Clowns: The Actual D&D Rules for Running a Horrifying Circus Encounter
opportunities.why_now: EN World's clown-themed RPG Evolution column is timely and begs a rules-first companion breaking down the actual stat blocks/mechanics for pulling it off.
opportunities.angle: Rules-grounded breakdown citing specific monster stats, fear/madness mechanics, and encounter-building math

opportunities.title: This Week in TTRPG News: The 5 Rules Changes Buried in the July 10 Digest
opportunities.why_now: EN World's news digest compiles scattered rules-adjacent items that deserve a sharper, rules-first re-read for readers who skipped it.
opportunities.angle: Curated recap post pulling out only the mechanically relevant items with 'here's what it means at the table' framing

opportunities.title: Psyker Rules 101: What Owlcat's Saro Reveal Gets Right (and Simplifies) About Dark Heresy
opportunities.why_now: Owlcat just revealed a psyker companion for its Dark Heresy game, offering a hook to explain the actual tabletop psychic phenomena/perils rules it's based on.
opportunities.angle: Rules explainer comparing video-game abstraction to the real Dark Heresy 2e psychic power and Perils of the Warp tables
